languages.text: "Я Вольный Торговец, и это вам, нечестивым тварям, стоит выказывать мне почтение. Я заберу с собой все, что пожелаю".
"I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."
languages.original_text: "Я Вольный Торговец, и это вам, нечестивым тварям, стоит выказывать мне почтение. Я заберу с собой все, что пожелаю".

traits.locale_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."
"I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."
"Indeed? Well, I'm a Rogue Trader, and I claim ownership over whatever I wish."
"I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."
"I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

languages.text: 「そうなの？じゃあ、私はローグトレーダーで、自分が欲しいものは何でも所有権を主張する」
languages.original_text: "Indeed? Well, I'm a Rogue Trader, and I claim ownership over whatever I wish."

traits.locale_text: 「そうなの？じゃあ、私はローグトレーダーで、自分が欲しいものは何でも所有権を主張するわ。」

languages.text: «Soy Comerciante Independiente, y sois vosotras, abominaciones, las que me mostraréis respeto. Me llevaré lo que quiera de aquí».
languages.original_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

traits.locale_text: «Soy Comerciante Independiente, y sois vosotras, abominaciones, las que me mostraréis respeto. Me llevaré lo que quiera de aquí».

languages.text: “我是行商浪人，该是你们这些亵渎邪物向我表示敬意。这地方的东西，只要我想要，就是我的。”
languages.original_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

traits.locale_text: “我是行商浪人，该是你们这些亵渎邪物向我表示敬意。这地方的东西，只要我想要，就是我的。”

languages.text: "Ich bin {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}, und ihr unheiligen Teufel werdet mir Ehrfurcht bezeigen. Ich werde von hier mitnehmen, was mir beliebt."
languages.original_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}, und ihr unheiligen Teufel werdet mir Ehrfurcht bezeigen. Ich werde von hier mitnehmen, was mir beliebt."

languages.text: "Ben Hür Tacir'im, siz uğursuz iblisler bana saygı göstereceksiniz. Buradan canım ne isterse alacağım."
languages.original_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Hür Tacir'im, siz uğursuz iblisler bana saygı göstereceksiniz. Buradan canım ne isterse alacağım."

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et c'est vous qui allez faire preuve de respect, vermines. Je prendrai ce que bon me semble. »
languages.original_text: "I am a Rogue Trader, and it is you unholy fiends who will show me reverence. I will take whatever I please from this place."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et c'est vous qui allez faire preuve de respect, vermines. Je prendrai ce que bon me semble. »
